writing_guidelines.main_body_strategy: Clear exposition with strong empirical evaluation. NLP community expects thorough error analysis.
writing_guidelines.figure_strategy: Include example outputs, attention visualizations, or pipeline diagrams.
writing_guidelines.table_strategy: Standard result tables with bolded best results. Include multiple baselines.
writing_guidelines.proof_strategy: Formal proofs uncommon in NLP. Focus on empirical evidence.
writing_guidelines.related_work_placement: After introduction. Discuss both NLP and relevant ML work.

common_pitfalls: Not comparing against recent strong baselines
